MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-08-2017 IN 206, DEFENDANT MARISSA CRISTINA JUVERA'S REQUEST FOR ORDER TO OPT OUT OF MANDATORY EXPEDITED JURY TRIAL PROCEDURES. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT DENIES THE REQUEST TO OPT OUT FOR THE REASON THAT THE INFORMATION PROVIDED IS NOT SUFFICIENT TO GRANT THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-17-2017. THE JUN-21-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
